LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANTS KELLY DEARMAN AND URBAN STRATEGIES, INCORPORATED'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT - GIVEN PLAINTIFF'S INTENTION NOT TO AMEND THE COMPLAINT, DEMURRER IS OVERRULED AS TO CAUSES OF ACTION 1 THROUGH 6 BECAUSE THEY ARE NOT SUBJECT TO WORKERS COMPENSATION EXCLUSIVITY AND AS TO CAUSE OF ACTION 8 BECAUSE IT IS SUFFICIENTLY PLEADED. CGC-11-509678; OR IN THE ALTERNATIVE, MOTION FOR PARTIAL CONSOLIDATION - THE MOTION FOR PROTECTIVE ORDER IS GRANTED IN PART AND DENIED IN PART ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. THE MOTION FOR RECONSIDERATION IS DENIED. NO NEW LAW OR FACTS SUPPORT THE MOTION FOR RECONSIDERATION. MOTION FOR PARTIAL CONSOLIDATION IS DENIED. Notice Of Motion For Protective Order
Off Calendar Sep-28-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
DEFENDANTS URBAN STRATEGIES, INCORPORATED AND KELLY DEARMAN'S Motion For Protective Order IS TRANSFERRED TO DEPARTMENT 302 TO HE HEARD ON THE SAME DAY AT 9:00 A.M. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR # 7489 =301/EHG

Defendant Urban Strategies, Inc., Kelly Dearman
Off Calendar Sep-28-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
DEFENDANT URBAN STRATEGIES, INC.'S MOTION FOR PROTECTIVE ORDER; AND
PLAINTIFF JUANA PASCUBELLO AND PLAINTIFF AKILI CALHOUN'S MOTION FOR RECONSIDERATION OF COMPLETE CONSOLIDATION OF CASE WITH CASE NO. CGC-11-509678; OR IN THE ALTERNATIVE, MOTION FOR PARTIAL CONSOLIDATION.

APPEARANCES: Pamela Pitt, Esq. of Law Office of Pamela Pitt 291-9251 for pltfs & opposing parties; Tracy C. Lemmon, Esq. of Law Offices of Bragg & Kuluva 273-6500 for deft & moving party.

RULING: RE MOTION FOR PROTECTIVE ORDER - The Court adopted its tentative ruling - GRANTED IN PART THAT SETS DATES FOR THE DEPOSITIONS. DENIED REGARDING REQUEST THAT EACH PARTY IS NOT AT EACH OF THE DEFENDANTS' DEPOSITIONS AT THE SAME TIME. PLAINTIFFS SHALL NOT ATTEND EACH OTHER'S DEPOSITIONS UNTIL THE PORTION OF THE DEPOSITION WITNESSING THE OTHER PLAINTIFF'S CASE. Order signed in open court.
RE MOTION FOR RECONSIDERATION - The Court adopted its tentative ruling - DENIED. NO NEW LAW OR FACTS SUPPORT THE MOTION FOR RECONSIDERATION. MOTION FOR PARTIAL CONSOLIDATION IS DENIED. THESE MATTERS ARE LIKELY TO PROCEED BEFORE ONE JUDGE COMMENCING OCTOBER 3RD. Defendant to submit a proposed form of order. (302/CWW) JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-12-2011 Continued To Sep-30-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jul-15-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES - ATTY. PAMELA PITT, TEL. NO. 291-9251 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. TRACY C. LEMMON OF THE LAW OFFICES OF BRAGG & KULUVA, TEL. NO. 273-6500 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANTS URBAN STRATEGIES INCORPORATED & KELLY DEARMAN.

RULING - A R G U E D; GIVEN PLAINTIFF'S INTENTION NOT TO AMEND THE COMPLAINT, DEFENDANTS KELLY DEARMAN AND URBAN STRATEGIES, INCORPORATED'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS OVERRULED AS TO CAUSES OF ACTION 1 THROUGH 6 BECAUSE THEY ARE NOT SUBJECT TO WORKERS COMPENSATION EXCLUSIVITY AND AS TO CAUSE OF ACTION 8 BECAUSE IT IS SUFFICIENTLY PLEADED. DEFENDANTS WERE GIVEN 10 DAYS LEAVE TO ANSWER FROM NOTICE OF ENTRY OF ORDER. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. =301/PJB
